name: Masked Stranger
description: An aggressive Grounded 2 combatant that uses a strange stance and opportunistic attacks to pressure the player.
behavior: It moves deliberately and punishes mistakes with quick tempo changes.
interactionWithPlayer: It attacks head-on and changes patterns to punish an unprepared player.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually does not interact much with other creatures, except in nearby fights.
strategy: Watch its tempo changes and do not respond late to its pressure. Punish it between transitions.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Basic Attack: 40. 2-Hit Combo: 40. 3-Hit Combo: 40. Charged Attack: 100. Leap Attack: 45. Spicy Burst: 100. 4-Hit Spin Combo: 40. 5-Hit Combo: 33.

abilities.name: Basic Attack
abilities.description: A quick opener used to test your first block and keep you in front of him.

abilities.name: 2-Hit Combo
abilities.description: A short string used to stop early retaliation.

abilities.name: 3-Hit Combo
abilities.description: It extends pressure with a third hit to punish automatic answers.

abilities.name: Charged Attack
abilities.description: It delays for a moment and then delivers a hit that punishes imprecise blocks.

abilities.name: Leap Attack
abilities.description: He leaps from mid-range to take control back if you manage to create space.

abilities.name: Spicy Burst
abilities.description: He releases a spicy blast to force movement and break the pace of the duel.

abilities.name: 4-Hit Spin Combo
abilities.description: A spinning chain meant to catch players escaping sideways.

abilities.name: 5-Hit Combo
abilities.description: The longest string in the fight, meant to finish mistakes once you are already under pressure.

bossPhases.label: Phase 1
bossPhases.summary: He opens with mostly physical pressure: quick attacks, short strings, and a leap to reclaim distance when you pull away.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: High tempo, but there are still clear pauses between one string and the next.

bossPhases.label: Phase 2
bossPhases.trigger: Its health drops to roughly two thirds.
bossPhases.summary: He begins mixing spicy bursts into spinning strings to force movement and punish predictable answers.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: More frequent attacks and shorter punish windows.
newPatterns: He alternates spicy area pressure and spins to punish both planted blocking and sideways retreats.

bossPhases.label: Phase 3
bossPhases.trigger: Its health falls into the final third.
bossPhases.summary: The final phase combines his longest combos, leap pressure, and spicy bursts with the smallest breathing room of the whole fight.
bossPhases.aggressionChange: Maximum aggression and finishing patterns meant to punish any late mistake.
newPatterns: Its longer strings appear more often after the leap or the spicy burst.
